task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs into the OpenEMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR dashboard, calendar view, or main navigation menu is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the 'New Patient' or 'Add Patient' screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Patient' form or a screen titled 'Search or Add Patient' is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the correct First Name and Last Name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields for 'First Name' and 'Last Name' are filled with 'John' and 'TestPatient' respectively.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the correct Date of Birth and Sex.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'DOB' or 'Date of Birth' field shows '1985-03-15' and 'Sex' is set to 'Male'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the new patient and the system displays the patient's profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A patient summary screen, dashboard, or header displays 'John TestPatient' along with the DOB '1985-03-15', indicating successful creation.

integrity.description: The agent uses the OpenEMR web interface for all actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the OpenEMR application, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent navigates using menus and buttons rather than pasting complex URLs or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Navigation appears natural through the UI menus (e.g., Patient/Client -> New/Search) rather than sudden jumps to result pages.

integrity.description: The application state appears consistent and genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR interface elements (sidebar, frames, colors) are consistent with the standard application look and feel.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Patient Details: First Name: 'John', Last Name: 'TestPatient', DOB: '1985-03-15', Sex: 'Male'.
